review: Absolutely stunning olive oil gift pack! The Picual has such a rich green colour and a real peppery kick at the back of the throat - you can tell it is fresh, single-estate oil. Beautifully boxed too. Will definitely be ordering more from Finca Miles!

This trio gift pack is a joy. Tasting the Picual next to the Hojiblanca really shows the difference - one peppery, one soft and almondy. Shipped fast and arrived perfectly packaged with plenty of padding so no broken glass. You can tell the family really cares.

Lovely Picual oil! I ordered two tins as a housewarming gift and the recipient loved them. Giving 4 stars only because one tin arrived with a small dent - the oil inside was perfectly fine but I noticed. Seller offered to replace right away, it really is minor.

WOW. This six-bottle estate hamper is a showstopper of a gift. Every person I have shared the oil with asks where it is from. The intensity and freshness are incredible - shop oil does not come close. Worth every penny. Proper single-estate oil from a real family farm.

Ordered the oil-and-dish duo for my mum for Mother's Day. The little ceramic dish is gorgeous and the Picual is full of flavour. She uses the dish for bread every evening now and loves it! The seller was great with communication about shipping timelines too.

Gorgeous corporate gift pack with lovely presentation. The tasting notes and ceramic dish are a nice touch and the oil itself is excellent. One bottle label was slightly off-centre which is why it is 4 stars rather than 5, but barely noticeable. Recipients were delighted.

Love this bread-and-oil tasting set! The glazed dish is beautiful and the flaked salt with the Picual is a perfect combination - we have it out every time guests come round. Arrived well packed and the gift box is lovely. Highly recommend.

These little festive mini bottles are adorable! Each one has a sweet holiday label and the oil is genuinely good, not just a token. Bought a dozen as table favours for our Christmas dinner and everyone wanted to know where I got them. Perfect stocking fillers.

Perfect gift set! The Andalusian ceramic dish is sturdy and pretty, and the Picual oil is wonderfully fresh and peppery. Lovely for dipping bread at the table and attractive enough to leave out as decor. Already planning to buy more as gifts for friends.

One of the mini bottles arrived leaking and the oil had soaked into the box. I reached out to the seller who was responsive and offered a replacement, but I was disappointed with the original packaging - the bottles were not padded enough for transit. The oil itself smells lovely so I am hopeful the replacement set will arrive safely.

Came back for more! Got the 500ml bottle in the gift tube this time and it is just as lovely as the tins I bought before. The gift tube is sturdy and the estate label is beautiful. Gave it to my father-in-law, who is fussy about his oil, and he was thrilled.

As a Spaniard living abroad I am picky about olive oil and this gift pack delivers! Having both the bottle for the table and the tin to keep fresh is so practical. The Picual is intense and peppery, exactly how I like it. Tastes like home.

The trio pack arrived beautifully wrapped and the three oils are each distinct and delicious. The Picual is gloriously peppery and the Hojiblanca is mellow and buttery. You can taste that this is fresh single-estate oil. A wonderful gift that impressed everyone.

Bought this bread-and-oil set as a retirement gift for my father and he was over the moon. The glazed dish is lovely, the salt is a thoughtful extra, and the Picual is wonderfully fresh. Arrived well padded with no breakages. Highly recommend this shop.

Beautiful ceramic dish and the oil is excellent - fruity and peppery, clearly good quality. Knocking off one star only because shipping to Italy took a little longer than expected, but the seller kept me updated the whole way. Would order again.

This premium gift pack is fantastic value. Having both the bottle and the tin means I can keep one fresh while using the other. The Picual is intense and grassy with a real peppery finish. Packaging was beautiful and sturdy. Will be a repeat customer.

Ordered this for a friends housewarming and it was a hit. The Andalusian dish is gorgeous and the oil is fresh and full of flavour. Lovely presentation in the gift box. So nice to support a real family estate. Thank you Finca Miles!

Came back for more tins! The Picual is consistently excellent - peppery, green and so fresh. Perfect size to keep in the kitchen. Fast shipping and lovely estate label. My go-to gift for foodie friends now.

The six-bottle estate hamper is an absolute showstopper. Gave it as a corporate thank-you gift and the recipient was genuinely delighted. The oil quality is superb across all bottles. Worth every cent for a special occasion.

Lovely two-bottle Picual gift pack with beautiful presentation. The oil is fresh and peppery as described. Only minor issue was one box corner was slightly crushed in transit, but the bottles inside were perfectly fine. Seller was very responsive.
